Privacy

Simple by design.

This site does not run advertising, behavioral tracking, or a contact form. Conversations are directed through LinkedIn.

What this site collects

This site does not use cookies, advertising networks, or behavioral tracking systems. No personal contact information is collected or stored by this site.

External services

This site may load fonts from Google Fonts. Google may process requests to its servers in accordance with its privacy policy.

Contact

Questions about this site can be directed through the contact page.

Chandra Kanojia

Enterprise AI, data readiness, CRM/Salesforce, workflow, and regulated operating change.
